spoilers.title: #OnePiece #OnePiece1182 #opspoilers Dragon's first appearance was during a heavy rain marked by the "Zaaaa" (ザアアア) SFX for pouring rain. Now we learn the Rain Goddess is named Zaza, essentially the sa
spoilers.text: #OnePiece #OnePiece1182 #opspoilers Dragon's first appearance was during a heavy rain marked by the "Zaaaa" (ザアアア) SFX for pouring rain. Now we learn the Rain Goddess is named Zaza, essentially the same sound effect. This suggests Dragon is the current Rain God, Zaza.

spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1182 BRIEF SPOILERS -Sanji and Zoro are up, injured but not completely defeated. -Loki combines his lightning powers with Ragnir's ice, using several attacks. Imu counters with fireballs. -So
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1182 BRIEF SPOILERS -Sanji and Zoro are up, injured but not completely defeated. -Loki combines his lightning powers with Ragnir's ice, using several attacks. Imu counters with fireballs. -Sommers and Kilingham are indeed stronger. Sommers, for example, carries a giant ship on his back all by himself. They try to continue their plan to kidnap the children. -Kilingham creates his strongest creation yet (MMA), using the fear of his own dreams: Zaza, the Rain Goddess, whom the World Government fears most. -Zaza is so strong that she easily floods an entire village. -Zoro and Sanji prepare for the final fight against Kilingham and Sommers. BREAK NEXT WEEK Spoilers from the real culprit: @WorstGenHQ (WG, it was him)

spoilers.title: #OnePiece #OnePiece1182 #opspoilers Was Lily the previous Rain Goddess Zaza? Queen Nefertari is Egyptian and the Egyptian Lily Flower is a Water Lily. Were the poneglyphs spread with a heavy rain?
